release_target: estate-planning and estate-settlement SaaS, live at finalwishes-prod.web.app

criteria: The work names a buyer/user role (principal, heir, executor, trustee, legal, cpa) and the estate-planning or estate-settlement workflow it serves.
Change traces to a priced or retention-driving workflow (estate creation, vault/lockbox, directives/obituary, e-sign, settlement/probate, billing).
The first screen, empty state, failure state, and primary action are coherent for EVERY affected role.
UX changes are verified per-role in the browser (persona x surface matrix), not just by a passing build.
Auth (Firebase + MFA), estate-scoped Firestore/Storage rules, KMS encryption for PII/Vault, error handling, logging, and the deploy path are addressed or declared out of scope.
No literal credentials/secrets committed (gitleaks clean); web/api/functions tests and build pass.
Support/admin path, rollback/recovery, and graceful degradation when Sirsi Sign / guidance / Photos fail are addressed.
Deploy target recorded and live health confirmed (web + API) when the change ships.
A stranger can understand what changed, why it matters to a grieving or planning family, and how to evaluate it (docs / CHANGELOG / verification evidence).
